title: FurnitureLib
description: FurnitureLib is an Libary for Spigot Servers to handle 3d modeling with Armorstands over Packets, it requirement ProtocolLib.
body:
# FurnitureLib
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DqcgUFzu/images/01569b65c1bdd920919fb98d5f43b82d8836c740.jpeg)
[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/furniturelib) | [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/furniturelibary-protectionlib.9368/) | [Github](https://github.com/Ste3et/FurnitureLib) | [Wiki](https://dicecraft.de/furniture/newPerms.php)

## Introduction:
The FurnitureLib is an libary to handle Armorstand creations, based on packets to prevent some kind of lags for the Minecraft Server. It is under construction since 2015, i want to fix any kind of bug/glicht i can fix it.

## Supported Minecraft Versions:
Minecraft 1.9.x - 1.19.x

## Incompatible:
[Gayser](https://geysermc.org/): The default Settings turn of all Furniture Models for bedrock Players because the limited Bedrock Armorstand Position make it impossible to generate Models.

## Unsupported Minecraft Versions:
The Plugin support for Minecraft 1.8 has been stopped since the 1.9.x has been released the reason is the FurnitureLib has completley rewritten, and Mojang change alot of Item Position on Entitys the reason is some Models looks wired

## What did the Protectionlib deos ?
The ProtectionLib hooks into the api of Protection Plugins Plotsqaured/Worldguard/... to handel it with the FurnitureLib. It check if a player are the Owner of the Plot or Region who a furniture want to be placed to or is the player is trusted to give him automatically Furniture Buildingrights on his region / plot

## Dependencis
#### FurnitureLib:
- [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)
- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) (optional)
- [LightAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/lightapi.4510/) (optional)
- [ProtectionLib](https://github.com/Ste3et/ProtectionLib) (optional, it's inside of the FurnitureLib.zip)
